actions: teleport to road 1 lane -2 at s=330.0
teleport to road 1 lane -2 at s=300.0

story_actions: maintain lead at 20.0 m/s from simulation time 0.1 s
maintain ego at 20.0 m/s from simulation time 0.1 s to preserve the initial following gap
triggers: simulation time > 0.1 seconds starts the follow events
stop_conditions: stop when simulation time exceeds 8.0 seconds
assumptions: Safe following distance is represented by the initial 30 m longitudinal gap in the same lane.
Conservative follow behavior uses matched constant speeds instead of a controller-specific follow action.

matched: two scenario objects named lead and ego
same-lane placement with ego behind lead
story behavior keeps both vehicles at matched cruise speed
